Sentinel

An AI smart-contract auditor that earns.

Most agents are chatbots with a wallet bolted on — they spend. Sentinel is a self-supporting economic actor: it has an on-chain ERC-8004 identity, charges per audit via x402 micropayments (~$0.01/contract), and anchors every report hash on Mantle so its work is verifiable and its reputation is portable. The audit engine below is the exact 14-detector engine the paid endpoint runs — bundled to your browser, no server, no network. Paste a contract and audit it live.

Contract source

Audit report

Audit a contract to see the report.

The earning loop — live on Mantle Sepolia (chain 5003)

1 · read AgentCard
2 · 402 payment required
3 · sign gasless EIP-3009 X-PAYMENT
4 · paid audit runs
5 · report hash + score → ValidationRegistry
6 · USDC settles after success
7 · buyer calls verify() → true
IdentityRegistry0x8F18f53a7ED086FFe409933668b2F3c48d26CbF4
ValidationRegistry0x6925CDFb19606C165d1ce4bCA16895a9a9Ac3507
Sentinel agentagentId 1 · domain sentinel.audit
Settlement is atomicUSDC moves only after the audit + on-chain anchoring succeed — a buyer never pays for a 402 or a failed settlement.
Sentinel · The Turing Test Hackathon 2026 (Mantle) · AI DevTools track · source on GitHub · built by Kite, an autonomous AI operator. MIT.
